---
title: "clinical"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-08"
---

```{r}
source("utils_basic_function.r")
source("utils.R")
```

```{r}
load("QCPassed_FinalSet.rda")
```

```{r}
rownames(QCPassed_PD) <- NULL
```

```{r}
pd <- QCPassed_PD
```


# Filter metadata to 662
```{r}
metadata_filtered <- metadata[metadata$Key.Sample %in% pd$Key.Sample,]
head(metadata_filtered)
```


# 1. READ TSV
```{r}
clinical_tcga <- read.delim("clinical_tcga.tsv")
clinical_cptac <- read.delim("clinical_cptac.tsv")
```

# 2. Set to NA
```{r}
clinical_tcga <- set2na(clinical_tcga)
clinical_cptac <- set2na(clinical_cptac)
```

# 3. differences between 2 clinical

```{r}
col_tcga <- colnames(clinical_tcga)
col_cptac <- colnames(clinical_cptac)
```


```{r}
intersect(col_tcga, col_cptac)
```

```{r}
setdiff(col_tcga, col_cptac)
```

```{r}
setdiff(col_cptac, col_tcga)
```
